ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the property is located */,
  "house_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the property (e.g., Condo, Multi-Family Home) */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Listed price of the property */,
  "bathrooms" REAL /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "crime_index" REAL /* Crime index of the neighborhood (lower is better) */,
  "minutes_to_loop" INTEGER /* Minutes to drive to the loop (downtown area) */,
  "miles_to_lake" REAL /* Distance to the nearest lake in miles */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the property in years */,
  "lot_size_sqft" INTEGER /* Size of the lot in square feet */,
  "house_size_sqft" INTEGER /* Size of the house in square feet */,
  "school_index" REAL /* School index of the neighborhood (higher is better) */,
  "estimated_price" INTEGER /* Estimated price of the property based on market analysis */,
  "parking_type" TEXT /* Type of parking available (e.g., street, garage, lot) */,
  "parking_spaces" INTEGER /* Number of parking spaces available */,
  "open_house_schedule" TEXT /* Open house schedule */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the property (e.g., active, pending, sold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_house_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_type_id") REFERENCES house_types ("house_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighborhood is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the neighborhood is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the neighborhood */,
  "walkability_score" REAL /* Walkability score of the neighborhood (higher is better) */,
  "public_transportation_score" REAL /* Public transportation score of the neighborhood (higher is better) */,
  "safety_index" REAL /* Safety index of the neighborhood (higher is better) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "house_types" (
  "house_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each house type */,
  "house_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the house type (e.g., Condo, Multi-Family Home) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the house type */,
  "avg_price_range" TEXT /* Average price range of the house type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("house_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Sale, Rental) */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the transaction */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent handling the transaction */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "client_email" TEXT /* Email of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_transactions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_transactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the agent works for */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., property manager, agent, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the school district */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the school district (higher is better) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school district */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., elementary, high school) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the school (higher is better) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES school_districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_schools" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from the property to the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id", "school_id")
)
